title: Projektmanagement Innovation & PMO (w/m/d)
missing_skills: German at working proficiency (CV shows B1 — Berlin German-language role requires stronger level)
Formal workshop moderation experience (town hall facilitation present but not explicit workshop design)
core_responsibilities: Bereichsübergreifende Projekte eigenverantwortlich steuern und umsetzen
Workshops und Formate konzipieren und moderieren
Neue Trends und Methoden identifizieren und in Pilotprojekte überführen
recommended_emphasis: HSBC: 6-workstream PMO coordination — directly maps to 'bereichsübergreifende Projekte eigenverantwortlich steuern'
HSBC: hybrid town hall events for 300+ — reframe as facilitation/workshop design for internal formats
HSBC: budget variance dashboards + risk escalation — demonstrates structured reporting and transparency
Hapag-Lloyd: agile sprint ceremonies — satisfies agile methods requirement
HSBC: cross-functional interface (Product/Engineering/Marketing/C-suite) — mirrors ADAC's cross-divisional collaboration requirement
AI tools (ChatGPT/Claude) — explicitly maps to Copilot/KI-Tools bonus requirement
